title: Rich Tender French Colby Jack Cheese Souffle
description: A nutty, tender, and cozy French dish featuring Colby Jack cheese in a souffle form, perfect for a special occasion, sashimi-cut and free from onion and garlic.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Butter a 1-quart souffle dish and coat with grated cheese.
In a medium saucepan, whisk together the milk, flour, and a pinch of salt, then cook over medium heat until the mixture thickens.
Remove the sauce from the heat and stir in the grated cheese until melted and smooth.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg yolks and a pinch of salt, then stir into the cheese sauce.
In another bowl, beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
Gently fold the egg whites into the cheese sauce until no white streaks remain.
Season with salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Pour the souffle mixture into the prepared dish and smooth the top.
Bake for 25 minutes, then reduce the oven temperature to 325 degrees Fahrenheit and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes.
